agentApp.lab.title: Agent App Lab
agentApp.lab.description: Read-only validation for an Agent App package: manifest, projection, readiness, and cleanup dry-run. It does not run App UI, workers, or write into main registries.
agentApp.lab.package.title: Package Preview
agentApp.lab.package.description: Reads only the local fixture, computes package and manifest identity, and never executes the runtime package.
agentApp.lab.entries.title: Entry Projection
agentApp.lab.entries.description: Entries render as lab-only projections and do not enter command, Skill Catalog, or Workspace routes.
agentApp.lab.capability.title: Capability Requirements
agentApp.lab.capability.description: Derived from requires, runtimePackage, storage, and entry declarations.
agentApp.lab.capability.name: Capability
agentApp.lab.readiness.title: Readiness Check
agentApp.lab.readiness.description: P0 only explains missing host capabilities. It does not grant permissions or run migrations.
agentApp.lab.cleanup.title: Cleanup Dry-run
agentApp.lab.cleanup.description: Shows which paths and namespaces would be cleaned on failure or uninstall. P0 never deletes them.
agentApp.lab.cleanup.empty: No cleanup targets in this category for P0.
agentApp.lab.boundary.title: Main Path Boundary
agentApp.lab.boundary.description: This Lab proves the App Host is removable without leaking experiment state into product paths.
agentApp.lab.boundary.noRuntime: Does not execute App UI bundles, workers, or workflows.
agentApp.lab.boundary.noRegistry: Does not write to command, skill, artifact, or workspace global registries.
agentApp.lab.boundary.noStorage: Does not create real App storage namespaces; it only previews cleanup.
agentApp.lab.footer: The next phase starts Mock Capability Host only after P0 passes. No cleanup dry-run, no P1.
